name: 遥控器
reference_context_policy: use palm or hand as scale reference, no clear stranger faces
reference_prompt: A black plastic button-style remote control, palm-sized, held in a hand for scale, showing front buttons without readable text, simple and clean, isolated on neutral background。源记录硬约束：数量:1；位置:石川手中桌前；运动政策:手持按压后静止
